lines: Okay okay lie down, you ready? So once there was a big emergency in Adventure Bay.
And Ryder pushed the button and he called all the pups, no don't sit up.
He said no job is too big, no pup is too small!
Then what?
So Chase came zooming up in his police truck, and Marshall the fire dog right behind him.
Skye flew her little helicopter, whoosh, up in the sky.
Why did Ryder call them?
Because a kitten got stuck way up on the lighthouse, that's why.
But here's the new part, okay? There was a brand new pup named Sprocket.
Sprocket is a tiny dog who can fix anything with his magic wrench.
Is Sprocket real?
He's our pretend one, yeah, we made him up. He's the best builder pup.
So Sprocket built a little ladder right up to the kitten.
And Chase used his net and Marshall sprayed water to make it soft.
Then they all rescued the kitty and Ryder said great job!
And Sprocket got his very own pup tag, a shiny gold wrench.
The end. Drink your water.
Can Sprocket come tomorrow night too?
stories.tell_note: Obvious: franchise named via Adventure Bay, Ryder, Chase, Marshall, Skye, and the catchphrase, all spelled right; Sprocket is the invented pup.

lines: So down in the deep deep ocean there's the team that lives in the Octopod.
What's the Octopod?
It's their underwater base, shaped like an octopus, with all the little submarines.
And the captain is a big polar bear, Captain Barnacles, he's so brave.
And there's a pirate cat with one eye, Kwazee, he loves adventures.
Kwazee always says yo ho ho.
So one day a baby creature was crying in a cave.
And tonight we put in a new one, a glowing seahorse named Lumi.
Lumi can light up the whole dark sea with her tail.
Did the captain find her?
Yeah, Barnacles took the little sub down to the cave.
And Kwazee swam in and Lumi lit everything up so they could see.
The crying baby was a lost octopus pup, all tangled up in seaweed.
So they cut him free and brought him back to his mama.
And then they did the creature report like they always do.
Lumi stayed to be the new light of the sea. Okay, eyes closed.
stories.tell_note: Medium: franchise not named aloud, but the Octopod, Captain Barnacles, the creature report, and mangled Kwazii ("Kwazee") fix it; Lumi the seahorse is invented.

lines: Alright, story about the rescue pups, the ones who live in the tall tower.
The boy who leads them, Rider, he got a call on his big watch.
No we already read the snowboard one, this is a new one.
A train was stuck on the tracks with rocks all over it.
So he called the bulldog, Rubble, the one who drives the digger.
Rubble, Rubble on the double! That's what he says.
And the police one in the blue, he set up the cones with his net.
But the rocks were too heavy for just them.
So tonight there's a new pup, an ox-strong one named Tank.
Tank is a huge gentle pup who can pull anything, even a train.
Is Tank stronger than Rubble?
Way stronger, but Rubble digs faster. They're a team.
So Tank pulled and Rubble dug and they got the rocks off the tracks.
And the train went choo choo, all the people clapped.
Rider gave Tank a new tag and said good work, pup.
Okay that's it, lie back down for real now.
stories.tell_note: Medium: franchise unnamed; mangled "Rider," plus Rubble, his catchphrase, the Lookout tower, and the watch identify it; Tank the ox-pup is invented.

lines: You want the underwater one? Okay, the team that explores, protects, and rescues.
There was a little penguin, the medic one, Payso, and he's kind of shy.
What's a medic?
He's the one who takes care of everybody when they get hurt.
So a whale got beached up on the shore, real far from the water.
And Payso was so worried, he got out his little medic bag.
Tonight we add a new friend, a friendly crab named Pinch.
Pinch can dig tunnels in the sand super fast with his big claws.
So Pinch dug a long channel from the whale right down to the sea.
And everybody pushed and pushed.
Did the whale make it?
Yeah, the water came up the tunnel and the whale floated free.
Payso checked him over and said he's all okay.
And the little vegetable creatures made a kelp cake to celebrate.
Pinch gets to live in the base now. The end.
No more, it's late, close your eyes.
stories.tell_note: Subtle: franchise never named; only the mangled medic-penguin Peso ("Payso"), the Vegimals ("little vegetable creatures"), and the explore-protect-rescue line; Pinch the crab is invented.

lines: So it was snowing really hard up on the big mountain.
And the snow pup, the husky one named Everest, she lives up there.
Why does she live on the mountain?
Because she helps anybody who gets lost in the snow, that's her job.
A little goat slipped down into a crack in the ice.
And the boy leader, um, Rider, called on his watch, said this looks like a job for the pups.
We made a new one tonight, a snowy owl pup named Frost.
Frost can fly over the snow and find anybody with her big eyes.
So Frost flew up high and spotted the little goat way down.
And Everest used her snowboard, whoosh, down the hill.
Then what happened?
She used her cable to lift the goat up nice and slow.
And Frost flew next to it so the goat wouldn't be scared.
They all got back and got warm and dry.
And Frost got her own little pup tag with a snowflake on it.
Okay sleepy, that's enough mountain for one night.
stories.tell_note: Subtle: franchise never named; Everest the husky, the mangled leader "Rider" (Ryder), the watch, the snowboard, and the pup tag are the only tells; Frost the owl pup is invented.
